caption: A person's hands are seen manipulating a black foam box on a surface featuring a logo with palm trees. In the background, another man with a beard wearing a navy blue shirt is visible in a small picture-in-picture window. On the right side of the main scene, a logo reads "JASPYS" with a red and white design, and text below it states "CASEBREAKS.COM". The person's hands enter the frame to open or adjust the lid of the black foam box. Beside the box, several stacks of graded trading cards in plastic slabs are visible. As the sequence progresses, the hands lift the lid of the box, revealing its interior. The man in the inset window remains present, observing the process. The setting appears to be a professional workspace dedicated to trading card breaks.
